name: NVIDIA
confidenceReason: Massive discount to peers (36x vs 80.7x avg). CAGR 22-28%. Vera Rubin platform implies $40B upside to consensus. Deeply entrenched value-compounder.
bullCase: NVIDIA is generating the highest quality earnings in semiconductor history but trades at a massive discount to peers (36x vs 80.7x). The upcoming Vera Rubin platform (H2 2026) promises a 5x inference improvement, implying a $40B upside to consensus. It is now a deeply entrenched value-compounder.
bearCase: The PEG ratio has expanded to 1.6x, indicating hyper-growth percentage gains are mathematically exhausting. If hyperscaler CapEx draws down, the cyclical shock will be violent.

cagrModel.basis: Exit PE below 10yr avg (55); adjusted for mega-cap maturation
